---
title: "cluster-hzcats-variables-dists"
format: html
---
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
hz <- read_csv("../../minerva/Hazards/Datasets/DT-hzcats-society-level.csv")
```

This document is to explore the relative distributions of the initial variables planned for the cluster analysis.

## all hazards count
```{r}
one <- hz %>%
  filter(!is.na(allhazards_est_count_30)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = allhazards_est_count_30)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 5, color = "black", fill = "lightblue") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 100, by = 5)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "allhazards_est_count_30",
    x = "est hazard count",
    y = "n societies"
  )

IA <- hz %>%
  filter(!is.na(allhazards_est_count_30_IA)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = allhazards_est_count_30_IA)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 5, color = "black", fill = "palegreen3") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 100, by = 5)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "allhazards_est_count_30_IA",
    x = "est hazard count",
    y = "n societies"
  )

one + IA
```
## disaster counts
```{r}
one <- hz %>%
  filter(!is.na(disaster_est_count_30)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = disaster_est_count_30)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 5, color = "black", fill = "lightblue") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 100, by = 5)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "disaster_est_count_30",
    x = "est disaster count",
    y = "n societies"
  )

IA <- hz %>%
  filter(!is.na(disaster_est_count_30_IA)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = disaster_est_count_30_IA)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 5, color = "black", fill = "palegreen3") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 100, by = 5)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "disaster_est_count_30_IA",
    x = "est disaster count",
    y = "n societies"
  )

one + IA
```

## normative counts
```{r}
hz %>%
  filter(!is.na(normative_est_count_30)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = normative_est_count_30)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 5, color = "black", fill = "lightblue") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 100, by = 5)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "normative_est_count_30",
    x = "est normative hz count",
    y = "n societies"
  )

hz %>%
  filter(!is.na(normative_est_count_30_IA)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = normative_est_count_30_IA)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 5, color = "black", fill = "palegreen3") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 100, by = 5)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "normative_est_count_30_IA",
    x = "est normative hazard count",
    y = "n societies"
  )

```

## all hazard food destroying severity exposure
```{r}
hz %>%
  filter(!is.na(allhazards_H9a_sev_exposure_30)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = allhazards_H9a_sev_exposure_30)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 5, color = "black", fill = "lightblue") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 100, by = 5)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "allhazards_H9a_sev_exposure_30",
    x = "food destroying hazard exposure",
    y = "n societies"
  )

hz %>%
  filter(!is.na(allhazards_H9a_sev_exposure_30_IA)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = allhazards_H9a_sev_exposure_30_IA)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 5, color = "black", fill = "palegreen3") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 100, by = 5)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "allhazards_H9a_sev_exposure_30_IA",
    x = "food destroying hazard exposure",
    y = "n societies"
  )

```

## all hazard severity exposure
```{r}
hz %>%
  filter(!is.na(allhazards_sev_exposure_30)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = allhazards_sev_exposure_30)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 5, color = "black", fill = "lightblue") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 100, by = 5)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "allhazards_sev_exposure_30",
    x = "hazard severity exposure",
    y = "n societies"
  )

hz %>%
  filter(!is.na(allhazards_sev_exposure_30_IA)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = allhazards_sev_exposure_30_IA)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 5, color = "black", fill = "palegreen3") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 100, by = 5)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "allhazards_sev_exposure_30_IA",
    x = "hazard severity exposure",
    y = "n societies"
  )

```

```{r}
plot_pair <- function(var_base, xlab_text) {
  
  p_top <- hz %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[var_base]])) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = .data[[var_base]])) +
    geom_histogram(binwidth = 5, color = "black", fill = "lightblue") +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 100, by = 5)) +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(title = var_base, x = xlab_text, y = "n societies")
  
  p_bottom <- hz %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[paste0(var_base, "_IA")]])) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = .data[[paste0(var_base, "_IA")]])) +
    geom_histogram(binwidth = 5, color = "black", fill = "palegreen3") +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 100, by = 5)) +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(title = paste0(var_base, "_IA"), x = xlab_text, y = "n societies")
  
  p_top / p_bottom
}
```

```{r}
plot_pair("allhazards_est_count_30", "est hazard count")
plot_pair("disaster_est_count_30", "est disaster count")
plot_pair("normative_est_count_30", "est normative hz count")
plot_pair("allhazards_H9a_sev_exposure_30", "food destroying weighted severity")
plot_pair("allhazards_sev_exposure_30", "all hazard weighted severity")
```

```{r}
test <- hz %>%
  filter(!is.na(allhazards_est_count_30), !is.na(disaster_est_count_30), 
         !is.na(allhazards_H9a_sev_exposure_30), !is.na(allhazards_sev_exposure_30))

vars <- c(
  "ID", 
  "allhazards_est_count_30",
  "disaster_est_count_30",
  "normative_est_count_30",
  "allhazards_H9a_sev_exposure_30",
  "allhazards_sev_exposure_30"
)
IA_vars <- c(
  "ID",
  "allhazards_est_count_30_IA",
  "disaster_est_count_30_IA",
  "normative_est_count_30_IA",
  "allhazards_H9a_sev_exposure_30_IA",
  "allhazards_sev_exposure_30_IA"
)
hz %>%
  select(all_of(vars)) %>%
  summarise(
    across(
      -ID,
      list(
        n_missing = ~ sum(is.na(.)),
        prop_missing = ~ mean(is.na(.)),
        n_cases = ~ sum(!is.na(.)),
        n_SCCS_cases = ~ sum(!is.na(.) & ID <= 186)
      ),
      .names = "{.col}_{.fn}"
    )
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    everything(),
    names_to = c("variable", ".value"),
    names_pattern = "(.+)_(n_missing|prop_missing|n_cases|n_SCCS_cases)"
  )

hz %>%
  select(all_of(IA_vars)) %>%
  summarise(
    across(
      -ID,
      list(
        n_missing = ~ sum(is.na(.)),
        prop_missing = ~ mean(is.na(.)),
        n_cases = ~ sum(!is.na(.)),
        n_SCCS_cases = ~ sum(!is.na(.) & ID <= 186)
      ),
      .names = "{.col}_{.fn}"
    )
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    everything(),
    names_to = c("variable", ".value"),
    names_pattern = "(.+)_(n_missing|prop_missing|n_cases|n_SCCS_cases)"
  )
```
